title: Spencer's Retail Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Spencer's Retail Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Spencer's Retail Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Spencer's Retail Holdings Services:
Spencer's Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail Holdings Services!
